description: Update backend and frontend to make 'Add Renter' create an invitation record (like staff flow) with role='renter'. Make email required. Remove old invite button from detail page.
steps: 1. In backend/app/models/renter.py: Change `email: Optional[str] = None` to `email: str` in the RenterCreate model.

2. In backend/app/services/renter_service.py - create_renter(): After inserting into renter_profiles, also create an invitations record following the exact same pattern as staff_service.py create_staff(). Use: id=uuid4, token=uuid4, email=data.email, role='renter', organization_id=org_id, full_name=data.full_name, phone=data.phone, accepted_at=None. Also check for duplicate pending invitation with the same email before creating.
3. In frontend/src/types/renter.ts: Change `email?: string` to `email: string` in the RenterCreate interface (keep it optional in Renter and RenterDetail since existing renters may lack email).

4. In frontend/src/pages/renters/RenterFormPage.tsx: Make the email input field required (add `required` attribute), add asterisk (*) to email label text ('Email *'), and move the email field to appear right after the full_name field (inside the 'Thong tin ca nhan' section, second field after Ho ten).
5. In frontend/src/pages/renters/RenterDetailPage.tsx: Remove the 'Gui loi moi' (invite) button and its inviteMutation logic. Remove the import of inviteRenter from the api module.
6. In frontend/src/api/renters.ts: Remove the inviteRenter() function export since it's no longer used.
acceptance_criteria: RenterCreate model in backend requires email as a non-optional str field
create_renter() service creates both a renter_profiles record AND an invitations record with role='renter'
create_renter() checks for duplicate pending invitation before creating
Frontend RenterFormPage.tsx has email as a required field with asterisk label, positioned after full_name
RenterDetailPage.tsx no longer has the invite button or inviteMutation
Python files pass AST syntax validation
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/PWA-Quan-Ly-Nha-Tro/backend && python -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('app/services/renter_service.py').read()); ast.parse(open('app/models/renter.py').read()); print('Python syntax OK')"
Grep for 'inviteRenter' in frontend/src/pages/renters/RenterDetailPage.tsx to confirm it's removed
Grep for 'invitations' in backend/app/services/renter_service.py to confirm invitation creation is present
findings: Had to also fix frontend/src/pages/contracts/ContractFormPage.tsx which used RenterCreate with only full_name (missing the now-required email field). Added email: '' to the initial state. Python required python3 command (not python) in the sandbox. Post-review fixes applied: id_photo_links added to renter_data in create_renter, get_renter_detail returns id_photo_links instead of old front/back urls, duplicate check moved before renter_profiles insert with 409 Conflict, invitation insert wrapped in try/except, stale PRD endpoint removed.
